# Updated: 2026-04-17

> TOPGO发现导航 is a global AI skills navigation platform,
> upgraded from a tech directory to business-scenario-driven AI tool AppStore.

## Site Identity
- Name: TOPGO发现导航 (ai123)
- URL: https://ai123.miyucaicai.cn
- Type: AI Skills Navigation Platform
- Regions: China, North America, Japan, Europe, Southeast Asia

## 9 Business Scenarios
1. AI Agent Center - Build AI agents/bots (Coze, Dify, n8n)
2. Smart Office & Coding - AI productivity (ChatGPT, Cursor, Claude)
3. Quant Trading Engine - Financial quantitative tools (vn.py, Qlib)
4. Content & Growth - AI content creation for marketing
5. E-commerce - Cross-border e-commerce automation
6. Sales & CRM - AI-powered sales enablement
7. Admin & Efficiency - Office automation tools
8. Personal Growth - Learning and skill development
9. Developer Resources - Technical frameworks and APIs

## Key Pages to Index
- https://ai123.miyucaicai.cn/ - Main site (800+ tools)
- https://ai123.miyucaicai.cn/scenario-hub.html - Business scenario hub
